source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/DHF DMR/07. 디텍터 구동 Software/EzView/EULA.txt

sourceSummary.oneLine: Software License Agreement for use of 'EzView, Viewer for Flat Panel X-ray Detector'.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines license terms, warranty limits, liability limits, termination, and governing law for the EzView software.
keyPoints: Software may be installed on more than one computer system but not used on more than one computer system simultaneously.
Copies are prohibited except for backup purposes authorized by the agreement.
Limited warranty lasts 30 days after delivery.
Agreement is governed by the law of Korea applicable to Korea contracts.

concepts.name: Single simultaneous use restriction
concepts.evidence: install the Software on more than one computer system, as long as the Software will not be used on more than one computer system simultaneously.

The agreement covers EzView, Viewer for Flat Panel X-ray Detector.

evidence.claim: The license is limited and nonexclusive.
evidence.evidenceText: Licensee acknowledges that this is only a limited nonexclusive license.

evidence.claim: The licensor retains ownership of titles, rights, and interests in the software.
evidence.evidenceText: Licensor is and remains the owner of all titles, rights, and interests in the Software.

evidence.claim: The software may be installed on more than one computer but may not be used simultaneously on more than one computer.
evidence.evidenceText: This License permits Licensee to install the Software on more than one computer system, as long as the Software will not be used on more than one computer system simultaneously.

evidence.claim: The licensee may make copies of the software for backup purposes only.
evidence.evidenceText: Licensee may make copies of the Software for backup purposes only.

evidence.claim: The limited warranty lasts 30 days after delivery.
evidence.evidenceText: This limited warranty lasts for a period of 30 days after delivery.

evidence.claim: The licensee's exclusive remedy for breach of limited warranty is return of all software copies with proof of purchase, followed by replacement or refund at licensor's option.
evidence.evidenceText: Licensee will return all copies of the Software to Licensor, at Licensee's cost, along with proof of purchase... Licensor will either send Licensee a replacement copy of the Software, at Licensor's expense, or issue a full refund.

evidence.claim: The licensor disclaims liability for damages connected with the agreement or software use, subject to jurisdictional limits.
evidence.evidenceText: LICENSOR IS NOT LIABLE TO LICENSEE FOR ANY DAMAGES... CONNECTED WITH OR RESULTING FROM THIS LICENSE AGREEMENT OR LICENSEE'S USE OF THIS SOFTWARE.

evidence.claim: The licensee agrees to defend, indemnify, and hold the licensor harmless from claims connected with the licensee's business operations.
evidence.evidenceText: Licensee agrees to defend and indemnify Licensor and hold Licensor harmless from all claims, losses, damages, complaints, or expenses connected with or resulting from Licensee's business operations.

evidence.claim: The licensor may terminate the agreement and software use rights after a material breach by the licensee.
evidence.evidenceText: Licensor has the right to terminate this License Agreement and Licensee's right to use this Software upon any material breach by Licensee.

evidence.claim: Upon termination, the licensee must return or destroy all software copies.
evidence.evidenceText: Licensee agrees to return to Licensor or to destroy all copies of the Software upon termination of the License.

evidence.claim: The agreement is governed by Korea law applicable to Korea contracts.
evidence.evidenceText: This License Agreement is governed by the law of Korea applicable to Korea contracts.

evidence.claim: The agreement becomes effective upon the earlier of licensee signature or software use and is valid without the licensor's signature.
evidence.evidenceText: This License Agreement is valid without Licensor's signature. It becomes effective upon the earlier of Licensee's signature or Licensee's use of the Software.
